subcodes.title: Words to Laura Clifford Barney (?) spoken around 1906
subcodes.first_line: Science is systemized Truth. The laws of spiritual science are as exact as those of mathematics... There are invisible threads which connect us with every object which makes up our environment.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity in diversity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @harmony of science and religion, @spiritual transformation, @power of love, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @unity; oneness of humanity
